Operation 'sendMessage' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks information about what the operation returns and the side effect of queuing the message for delivery. Added details about the response structure and delivery queuing behavior to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's outcomes.

data.current_description: Sends an email by providing individual attributes (to, from, subject, body, etc.).
data.description_suggestion: Sends an email message by providing individual message attributes such as recipient, sender, subject, body, and optional attachments. Returns a SendMessageResponse containing the message ID and delivery status. The message is queued for delivery through the Postal mail server.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks information about what the operation returns and the side effect of queuing the message for delivery. Added details about the response structure and delivery queuing behavior to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's outcomes.

message: Operation 'sendRawMessage' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing information about return value and delivery queuing side effect. Added clarity that this operation accepts raw email content and returns message ID and status, helping AI agents understand when to use this versus sendMessage and what to expect.

data.current_summary: Send a raw RFC 2822 email message
data.current_description: Sends an email by providing a pre-crafted RFC 2822 formatted message.
data.description_suggestion: Sends an email by providing a pre-crafted RFC 2822 formatted message body. This operation accepts raw email content and bypasses individual attribute parsing. Returns a SendMessageResponse containing the message ID and delivery status. The message is queued for delivery through the Postal mail server.
data.reasoning: Missing information about return value and delivery queuing side effect. Added clarity that this operation accepts raw email content and returns message ID and status, helping AI agents understand when to use this versus sendMessage and what to expect.

message: Operation 'getMessageDeliveries' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. The current description is too vague about what delivery information is returned. Enhanced description specifies the types of delivery data returned (status, timestamps, errors, bounces) to help AI agents understand the operation's output and determine if it matches their information needs.

data.current_description: Retrieves delivery information for a specific message.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves delivery status and tracking information for a specific message using the message ID. Returns delivery records including recipient addresses, delivery status, timestamps, and any delivery errors or bounce information.
data.reasoning: The current description is too vague about what delivery information is returned. Enhanced description specifies the types of delivery data returned (status, timestamps, errors, bounces) to help AI agents understand the operation's output and determine if it matches their information needs.
